title: Pending Messages
description: Buffered channel messages awaiting agent processing
emptyDescription: No buffered message groups found. Messages appear here when channels buffer incoming messages before agent processing.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.step1: Messages from channels (Telegram, Discord, etc.) are buffered here while the agent is busy or offline.
howItWorks.step2: When the buffer reaches the threshold (default: 50 messages), auto-compaction kicks in — an LLM summarizes older messages, keeping only the 15 most recent.
howItWorks.step3: On the agent's next turn, the compacted summary + recent messages are injected as context, so the agent catches up without being overwhelmed.
howItWorks.compactAction: Compact — Manually trigger LLM summarization now. Useful when you want the agent to process a clean summary instead of raw message flood.
howItWorks.clearAction: Clear — Permanently delete all buffered messages for a group. Use when messages are no longer relevant.

confirmClear.title: Clear messages?
confirmClear.description: This will permanently delete all messages in {{channel}} / {{key}}. This action cannot be undone.

toast.compactedDeleted: All messages deleted (no LLM provider available)
toast.compactingDesc: LLM summarization running in background. List will refresh automatically.
